title: chamaecytisus proliferus subsp. angustifolius
intro: Chamaecytisus proliferus subsp. angustifolius, also known as Spanish broom or petit broom, is a shrub that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Chamaecytisus proliferus subsp. angustifolius include alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), reducing inflammation, and supporting cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
